## Campaign

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind's recent map and scene updates enhance district navigation, mobile shell visibility, and walking interactions, delivering a more immersive cyberpunk coding world.
- CTA: Explore the new District 01 visuals and try the updated CityMap features in CodeGrind.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style image of District 01 cityscape with neon cyberpunk UI overlays, highlighting CityMap and CityScene components, with subtle motion blur to imply depth. Include captions: CityMap · CityScene · District 01.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
